revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == About == This template is used to create the ==See also== section at the bottom of all {{Commons...}} templates' documentation. == Usage == {{Commons templates see also}} == See also == * {{tl|Commons templates location}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Template namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons_templates_see_also%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
